organic.title: Minor burns - aftercare: MedlinePlus Medical Encyclopedia
organic.snippet: Clean the burn gently with soap and water. · Do not break blisters. · You may put a thin layer of ointment, such as petroleum jelly or aloe vera, ...

organic.title: How to treat a first-degree, minor burn
organic.snippet: Cool the burn. Immediately immerse the burn in cool tap water or apply cold, wet compresses. Do this for about 10 minutes or until the pain subsides.

organic.snippet: by J Hudspith · 2004 · Cited by 201 — The wound should be cleansed twice daily with mild diluted chlorohexidine solution. The burn should be covered with a bland ointment such as liquid paraffin.
